positive: Minimalist aesthetic forest scene print, featuring stylized silhouettes of tall birch trees and wandering forest animals (deer, fox, owl) arranged in a harmonious circular pattern. The style should be a modern, high-contrast woodcut etching, with clean black line art on a crisp white background. Use a limited palette of deep forest green and charcoal black for the negative space and primary lines. Strong contrast, excellent symmetry, central composition suitable for t-shirt printing. Highly detailed, graphic, flat design, vector illustration, Nordic folk art style.
